name: Verselor-V1
description: A Powerful, Lightweight, Multi-Device, Multifunctional, Multi-Purpose, & Multi-Tenant WhatsApp bot, built by Heavstal Tech. 2026

USE_PAIR_CODE.description: type `true` to get pair code and `false` to get qr code

WHATSAPP_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number in international format (the one the bot will be pairing to)

AUTH_CODE.description: Enter Your Authentication Code Here. To Get One visit: https://heavstal-bots.vercel.app/authcode

HT_API_KEY.description: Enter your `HEAVSTAL TECH API KEY` here (required for many commands). Get api key at: https://heavstal-tech.vercel.app/credentials

OWNERS.description: List of owner numbers (comma separated, no spaces)

ANTICALL.description: Anticall mode: off, reject, or block

MENU_STYLE.description: Visual layout style of the main menu (v1, v2, v3)

THUMBNAIL.description: Image URL to be used as thumbnail

PUBLIC_MODE.description: Set to true to make the bot respond to everyone, false for private mode only

SLEEP_MODE.description: Set to true to put bot in sleep mode

ONLY_PRIVATE.description: Set to true to restrict bot strictly to private chats

ONLY_GROUP.description: Set to true to restrict bot strictly to group chats

STARTUP_MESSAGE.description: Set to true to send startup message on boot

AUTO_REACT.description: Set to true to auto react to incoming messages

AUTO_RECORD.description: Set to true to simulate voice recording presence

AUTO_TYPING.description: Set to true to simulate typing presence

AUTO_RECORD_TYPE.description: Set to true to alternate typing and recording presences

AUTO_READ.description: Set to true to automatically mark messages as read

AUTO_BIO.description: Set to true to auto update WhatsApp bio

AUTO_VIEW_STATUS.description: Set to true to automatically view statuses/stories

WARN_LIMIT.description: Max warnings before a user is kicked

AI_PERSONA.description: Base instructions and persona for the AI
AI_PERSONA.value: You are a helpful assistant named Verselor V1 created by Heavstal Tech. You answer questions concisely.

AI2_MODE.description: Default personality mode for the secondary AI (e.g., neutral, sassy, fun)

ALIVE_MSG.description: Message to send when the 'alive' command is called
